text.title: Project Closure Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the project-closure methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: written_acceptance
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each deliverable must have written acceptance (signature/email/system entry) before closure declared.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `written-acceptance` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: lessons_captured_before_close
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Lessons-learned session must run BEFORE team disbands; post-disband capture is fiction.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `lessons-captured-before-close` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: contracts_closed
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: All contracts (vendor + customer) must be closed (final invoice + retention release) before closure.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `contracts-closed` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: handover_signed
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Handover doc must be signed by receiving ops team — silent hand-off is not hand-off.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `handover-signed` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: archive_manifest
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Archive must contain a manifest (file list + locations) so artefacts are retrievable years later.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `archive-manifest` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-project-closure.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
